comments: Approved. The drafted contract strictly bounds execution to producing the roadmap design document at tasks/v0.7-m5-b-legacy-tooling-roadmap.md: scope states 'Generate a roadmap document (tasks/v0.7-m5-b-legacy-tooling-roadmap.md)' and allowed_files contains only that document, while stop_conditions forbid modifying files outside allowed_files. The contract also explicitly preserves the requested safety rails in out_of_scope: 'Strictly NO actual deletion of Python scripts', 'NO modifications to existing shell bootstrap scripts', and 'NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models.' The recon packet is directionally consistent with this limited-document scope because it marks drafting the roadmap document as in-scope and deleting Python files / modifying active dispatch semantics as out-of-scope. The recon packet is less explicit than the contract about shell bootstrap scripts and iteration-state.json by name, but it does not expand execution authority beyond the contract, so the governing contract text is sufficiently strict for approval.
